title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Max Fashion Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Max Fashion Holdings Services:
Max Fashion Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion Holdings Services!
